types: Profile information (bio, profile picture, follower counts)
Content (photos, videos, Stories, Reels, captions, hashtags)
Activity (likes, comments, searches, clicks, time spent)

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

sold_to_third_parties.source_quote: Instagram does not sell user data; shares segments with advertisers instead

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Instagram creates advertiser audiences based on user behavior

cross_site_tracking.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Instagram tracks users across web via Instagram Pixel

used_for_profiling.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — detailed user profiling for feed personalization and ads

used_to_train_ai.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Instagram/Meta uses user data for AI training

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

retention_period.value: Content retained until deletion; metadata retained longer; some data retained indefinitely for legal/business purposes
retention_period.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

access_your_data.source_quote: Users can download data via Download Your Information tool

delete_your_data.source_quote: Users can delete posts, stories, messages, and request account deletion

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: Users can edit profile information and content

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: No sale opt-out available; advertising cannot be disabled

data_portability.source_quote: Download Your Information tool provides data portability

appeal_decisions.source_quote: Users can appeal content moderation decisions and ad account actions

encrypted_in_transit.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — HTTPS encryption standard

encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — encryption at rest standard practice

mfa_available.source_quote: Two-factor authentication via SMS, authenticator apps, and security keys

breach_notification.source_quote: Instagram notifies users of security breaches as legally required

independent_audits.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Meta undergoes SOC 2 Type II audits

honors_gpc.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Instagram does not honor GPC signals

honors_dnt.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Instagram does not honor DNT signals

childrens_privacy.notes: Complies with COPPA for under-13 users; Teen Accounts launched with reduced ad targeting and algorithmic restrictions
childrens_privacy.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

gaps: Specific retention periods by data type not disclosed

Exact scope of Meta integration and data sharing
label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Instagram is a Meta subsidiary sharing similar privacy practices with Facebook. Heavy reliance on behavioral data for personalization and advertising. Teen Accounts program (2023+) offers limited ad targeting for younger users but data collection remains extensive. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
